overall.description: A first-person walk through Night City in Cyberpunk 2077, featuring vibrant neon lights, wet reflective streets, futuristic vehicles, and iconic cyberpunk architecture with a massive spiral neon sculpture overhead. The scene transitions from a busy intersection to a covered walkway with orange textured pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city intersection with spiral neon sculpture overhead

events.description: futuristic green sports car drives through the crosswalk from left to right
white delivery van crosses the intersection followed by other vehicles

agents.ego_description: standing at the crosswalk observing traffic and the neon-lit surroundings

notable_agents.action: futuristic green sports car driving through the intersection
white delivery van crossing the intersection

entered.detail: massive colorful spiral neon light sculpture hanging overhead with purple, blue, and orange hues
concrete elevated highway overpass with teal railings spanning the street
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on wet asphalt
tall modern buildings with illuminated glass windows and neon accents

segments.scene_description: Standing at a futuristic city intersection at night, observing vehicles pass through the crosswalk. The iconic spiral neon sculpture hangs overhead casting colorful reflections on the wet pavement, while the elevated highway looms in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under elevated highway with spiral neon visible

events.description: moving from open intersection into covered area beneath the elevated highway
turning left to follow the curved path of the street under the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward under the overpass, glancing at the spiral neon structure overhead and the wet reflective pavement

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in the opposite direction on the sidewalk

entered.detail: street directional sign with white text reading 'NIGHT CITY' and arrow pointing left
large rectangular planters containing palm trees and tropical plants
piles of blue and white garbage bags stacked against the building wall

segments.scene_description: Walking under the elevated highway overpass, the environment becomes more enclosed. The spiral neon sculpture remains visible overhead while passing planters with palm trees and trash bags stacked on the left. The wet concrete sidewalk reflects the surrounding lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with construction barriers and crosswalks

events.description: crossing the street at a yellow striped crosswalk
entering area with red and white striped construction barriers lining the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and walking along the sidewalk next to construction barriers, following another pedestrian

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead on the sidewalk near the construction zone

entered.detail: red and white striped concrete barriers topped with barbed wire fencing
broad yellow striped pedestrian crossing with textured surface

segments.scene_description: Crossing the street at a yellow crosswalk and entering a construction zone lined with red and white barriers. The spiral neon sculpture becomes more distant as the camera moves forward, while digital billboards become visible on the left side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with orange flooring and digital billboard bridge

events.description: entering covered walkway with distinctive orange textured flooring
passing under a bridge densely packed with hanging digital billboards and advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking along the orange sidewalk passing under a bridge covered in digital advertisements and neon signs

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead under the billboard bridge

entered.detail: distinctive orange diamond-plate textured metal pedestrian walkway
overhead bridge structure covered with multiple hanging digital screens displaying advertisements
green metal railings separating the sidewalk from the street

segments.scene_description: Walking on the distinctive orange textured sidewalk under a bridge covered in dense digital billboards. The environment is fully enclosed with artificial lighting from neon shop signs and hanging advertisements, creating a classic cyberpunk street atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a wide, vibrant city intersection into the enclosed shadows of an urban overpass. It begins at a futuristic crossroads where vehicles pass through a crosswalk beneath a massive spiral neon sculpture that casts colorful reflections across the wet pavement. As the camera moves forward, the open vista of the intersection narrows and the elevated highway begins to loom overhead, shifting the atmosphere toward a more confined space. The scene then transitions under the concrete overpass, passing by planters with palm trees and stacked trash bags while the surrounding neon lights continue to shimmer on the damp sidewalk.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open city intersection into a densely enclosed, neon-lit urban corridor. It begins by crossing a yellow crosswalk and entering a construction zone marked by red and white barriers, as the massive spiral neon sculpture recedes into the distance. As the camera moves forward, digital billboards emerge on the left, guiding the path toward a bridge. The scene then shifts onto a distinctive orange textured sidewalk, where the open sky vanishes and the environment becomes fully enclosed. Finally, the view is dominated by a canopy of hanging advertisements and glowing shop signs, immersing the perspective in a classic cyberpunk street atmosphere.
